name: Peanut Butter Ice Cream (Bon Bons)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks well.
2. Blend in the milk, peanut butter, sugar, and salt until smooth.
3. Pour into a freezer tray or molds and freeze until almost hard.
4. Transfer to a bowl and beat again until smooth.
5. Return to the freezer tray or molds and freeze until firm.
Makes 4 to 6 servings
Try this with hot fudge sauce and topped with peanuts. Chocolate bon bon ice cream or other favorite flavor: Make sure the ice cream is hard frozen. Melt 12 oz of semi-sweet chocolate pieces and 1/2 cup margarine in a double boiler. Dip the ice cream balls into the melted chocolate, working quickly. Place the dipped pieces back in the freezer until the chocolate firms up. Wrap in foil or plastic wrap. For vanilla ice cream, add 1 tablespoon instant coffee to the melted chocolate. If time is limited, scoop the ice cream into small balls, freeze hard, and then dip as above.
